title_en: Alumni · MS in Engineering · Shenyang University of Technology
title_cn: 校友 · 工科硕士 · 沈阳工业大学
bio_en: Alumni of AI4Rad Lab. Received a Master's degree in Engineering from Shenyang University of Technology in 2023, and is now pursuing a PhD (2026 cohort) at the School of Information Science and Technology, Donghua University. Worked on medical imaging AI and CT report analysis in the lab.
bio_cn: AI4Rad Lab 校友。2023 年于沈阳工业大学获工科硕士学位，现为 2026 级东华大学信息科学与技术学院博士研究生。在实验室期间从事医学影像人工智能与 CT 报告分析相关研究。
interests_en: CT report analysis with large language models
interests_cn: 基于大语言模型的 CT 报告分析
